sentences.text: Please spell the name of the person first name first press seven for Q and nine for Z to cancel the current operation press Star. Press one for extension six nine one two to cancel and enter a different name press Star please hold while I transfer your call. Your call is being forwarded to one my tell voicemail system, extension six, nine. One two is not available. Please leave a message at the tone when finished you may hang up or press pound for additional options.
Thank you for calling C W S K Partners. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for a dial by name company directory press one to leave a message.

Good afternoon. My name is Deidre with the rentable. I was hoping to reach Jacqueline Eldridge. My callback number is nine five six four seven two four two eight zero again. This is Dino with venable. I was looking for Jacqueline Aldridge nine five six four seven two four two eight zero is the best call back number. Thank you.
